hero.headline: Transforming Workplaces. Saving Lives. Powering the Future.
hero.subheadline: Senior HSE Consultant, Trainer, and AI & Digital Solutions Specialist — delivering safety excellence, regulatory compliance, and digital transformation across 40+ countries and every major industry.

why_choose.title: Global Field Experience
why_choose.text: Deployed across 40+ countries in oil & gas, construction, manufacturing, and beyond. Real-world expertise, not just theory.

why_choose.title: Digital-First Approach
why_choose.text: The only HSE consultant who builds AI agents, Power BI dashboards, and SharePoint safety portals — bridging the gap between safety and technology.

why_choose.title: Certified Trainer & Coach
why_choose.text: NEBOSH and IOSH certified trainer with a 97%+ exam pass rate across ASP, CSP, CRSP, NEBOSH, IOSH, and ISO programs.

cta_banner.headline: Ready to Transform Your Safety Culture?
cta_banner.subtext: Whether you need a compliance audit, a Power BI dashboard, AI-powered tools, or NEBOSH coaching — let's start with a free 30-minute consultation.
